name: clickhouse-js-node-coding
description: Write idiomatic application code with the ClickHouse Node.js client (@clickhouse/client): configuration, inserts, selects, query parameters, sessions, and modern data types.

interface.longDescription: Use ClickHouse JS Node Coding for idiomatic Node.js client usage, including client configuration, inserts, selects, formats, query parameters, sessions, and modern ClickHouse data types.
defaultPrompt: Write Node.js code using the ClickHouse client.
Show how to query ClickHouse from Node.js.
